In the ground-truth ratings under 'purchase_properties', 'New Build' has a rating of 10 and 'Modern Apartment' has a rating of 9. The moving services in the final solution are described as 'Health-conscious moving package', which does not match exactly any name in the ground-truth moving_services. Since this is a custom description, there is no direct rating in the ground-truth dataset for this exact service, so it cannot be mapped. The setup services (electricity, water, internet) are not directly named in the ground-truth dataset, which uses package names like 'Premium Utilities', 'Smart Home Package', etc., so they cannot be mapped either.
